name: Latex OCR

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix Exception calling application: "NoneType' object is not callable by @amorsi1 in https://github.com/lucasvanmol/obsidian-latex-ocr/pull/42
* Use console.debug for debug logging by @lucasvanmol in https://github.com/lucasvanmol/obsidian-latex-ocr/pull/44
* Add server stop button
* Stopping now sends sigkill instead of sigterm

## New Contributors
* @amorsi1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/lucasvanmol/obsidian-latex-ocr/pull/42

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lucasvanmol/obsidian-latex-ocr/compare/0.8.0...0.9.0

releases.description:

- Use HF inference API for better error handling
  - If the inference server needs to be provisioned, it will automatically wait to complete the request.

releases.author: lucasvanmol
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Inference API Model: by default, the plugin will now use the huggingface inference API; there's no need to install python packages any more if you don't want to or can't run the model locally.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lucasvanmol/obsidian-latex-ocr/compare/0.3.0...0.4.0

releases.author: lucasvanmol
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* This release features a much easier install process, using the [latex-ocr-server](https://github.com/lucasvanmol/latex-ocr-server) python package
* Added a setting to configure model cache location

## Improvements
* Improve user feedback when model is being downloaded
* Use static codegen for proto files using ts-protoc

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lucasvanmol/obsidian-latex-ocr/compare/0.2.0...0.3.0

releases.author: lucasvanmol
